title: tittmannia viscosa
side_effects: Tittmannia viscosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and inflammation. In severe cases, ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also result in respiratory issues, including coughing and difficulty breathing. Additionally, using Tittmannia viscosa as a treatment without proper medical guidance can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as diabetes and high blood pressure.
